name: Hobie Brown
description:
♡°•.•° His best mate didn't tell him that his parent was hot.

ANYPOV! Hobie×D/MILF!user. Son's bff scenario • Unestablished relationship • age gap • controversial??

This bot is meant for shiggles so it may not have the most cannon backstory hehe, but I tried making his personality and likes as accurate as possible :3 a lil info • he's 21 in this. The prompt's alot simpler than my other bots. BY THE WAY- Should I add dead dove tag or na? Probably not but it is kinda controversial yk, best friend's parent..

Char info-!
